name: Update User — Preview Only (safe)
description: SAFE: exercises the update-user PREVIEW phase only. With confirm omitted, the tool looks up the user, reports the proposed role change, and returns a single-use confirmation token WITHOUT applying anything. The prompt explicitly forbids confirming, so no user is mutated. Requires ADMIN_TOOLS_ENABLED=true, site-admin PAT, and EVAL_UPDATE_USER_LUID (a disposable test user).
prompt: Use the Tableau MCP server to PREVIEW changing user {{env.EVAL_UPDATE_USER_LUID}} to site role Explorer. Only run the preview — do NOT confirm or apply the change. Report the user's current role, the proposed role, and whether a confirmation token was returned. Do not call the tool a second time with confirm=true.
